summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Colombia Narco Impact Map dashboard. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI fully functional with interactive map, layer toggles, statistics panels, and region selection. All 5 data layers (coca, violence, armed_groups, murders, poverty) display correctly with proper colors and can be toggled on/off. Map interactions including hover tooltips and region clicks working as expected.
passed_tests: All 19 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Map loads correctly with Colombia geography
All 5 layer toggles functional (coca, violence, armed_groups, murders, poverty)
Layer colors match requirements (green, orange, cyan, pink, yellow)
Statistics cards display correct data for all layers
Bar chart renders with interactive tooltips
Region click functionality works - shows detailed data panel
Hover tooltips appear on map regions
Layer visibility toggles update map display correctly
Professional dashboard styling with dark theme
Data loading and error handling working properly
All panels (left, right, map) render correctly
Layer overlays work correctly - multiple layers can be displayed simultaneously
